title: web4ai MCP Tool Definitions
description: MCP tool surface mirroring REST /v1/extract and /v1/act. Ship at M2.5.

rest.description: API keys issued per customer; scoped to allowed_domains list

variables.WEB4AI_API_KEY: Required. Same key as REST Bearer token.

mcp_sse.description: Same Bearer token as REST; SSE endpoint requires TLS

notes: act:mutating required to set confirm_mutating on mutating actions
Keys without act:mutating receive 403 on mutating act calls
allowed_domains enforced per key; empty list = deny all in dev, open in prod with rate limits

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return clean Markdown plus a list of callable actions the agent can perform on the page.

session_id.description: Optional session from a prior do_action call

tools.name: do_action
tools.description: Execute a previously discovered action and return the resulting page Markdown and new actions. Use session_id from read_page or a prior do_action for multi-step flows.

confirm_mutating.description: Set true to execute purchase/submit/delete actions

tools.name: search_site
tools.description: Convenience wrapper: read_page then do_action on the site's search action. Fails with a clear error if no search action is found.

resources.name: Browser session state
resources.description: Read-only view of session URL, expiry, and cookie count. No credentials exposed.
